title: Livig in Boulder vlog 12 - 18 - 18: Virtual rode 65 miles, gunna stream on Twitch now

transcript.text: Hello, living in Boulder V-Log for December 18th, 2018.
Last time I did a V-Log, it was this morning at like 2 in the morning, 1 in the morning for yesterday.
And I was just about to start riding my bike because I couldn't sleep.
I knew that I wasn't going to sleep between then and the rest of the day until sunrise.
So I figured I'd get a jump on the day.
So I rode 65 miles until about 6.30 or something.
And I could tell that I was not riding strong.
I was still, even though I took like a day off or something, I was still, my legs were sore.
And then I got 65 miles in.
I think I was going to ride like 100, but I got 65 miles in.
And then I said to myself, oh, you know what, I'm done with this simple stuff.
I want to figure out the technology, the OBS streaming program and the Elgato stream deck.
So I, yeah, I just got off the bike and I started working on just watching tutorials, you know,
On the Elgato and the OBS and figuring stuff out and making sure all the settings were right.
Because I set up the OBS streaming program on my computer, but then I have to set it up all over again on my new user, my stream user.
I set up a special user on the computer for streaming so that I don't overheat the computer.
I have two Macintoshes, one of them I'll use for streaming.
And then that's all I do is just stream with it so that I don't have to worry about it overheating, overcooking itself.
And then I have the other computer that I do everything else with while I'm riding my bike.
So that would include, yeah, but I think I'll do Zwift on the streaming computer so I can include it all in.
But, um, yeah, so, uh, I forgot what I was talking about.
So, um, yeah, right.
So I was doing that and then I, I did some settings and then I tried to do a test stream that was on private on my streaming channel and it wouldn't stream.
And I had some other technical problems today too.
I, I, I couldn't get my TV to, uh, see, do stream mirroring where, um, I could see on my camp, my, um, my big T screen TV, the screencast.
And, um, I even called Apple and then I kept turning on my TV and then all of a sudden it just worked.
So, and then, uh, yeah, so I started to stream on, on YouTube and it wasn't streaming.
The stream never appeared.
So I go, okay, well, let's just open up a Twitch account.
So I opened up a Twitch and then I clicked and I switched the stream key, you know, the settings from YouTube to Twitch.
And I hit, uh, stream and lo and behold, boom, right away.
It starts twitching on streaming on Twitch.
So I think the YouTube guys, they don't have their shit together for streaming.
They haven't figured that out yet.
And the Twitch guys, they've got their shit together.
So plus with the OBS streaming program and the Elgato stream deck, it's designed more for Twitch.
There's more buttons that you can do and stuff.
So, so yeah, I just thought to myself, okay, well I'm on Twitch.
I'll do Twitch then.
I'll figure out this Twitch stuff and do all my streaming for, uh, with Twitch.
And so, um, yeah.
And at that point I fell asleep.
I don't know if you can tell I'm tired.
I'm yawning my ass off.
So that was sometime in the afternoon before it got dark.
It was like three in the afternoon or whatever when I realized that I needed Twitch.
And then, and so I went, okay, Twitch, let me take a nap real quick.
And then I didn't wake up at 6.20 now until like a little bit ago when my mom invited me over to have some dinner.
Uh, she had some pizza.
So that's all I ate today was pizza because I had pizza for breakfast.
So, um, yeah, I'm still beat.
It's too bad that I was totally awake from midnight to sunrise.
That's kind of what my schedule is.
I'm always awake.
Could not be more awake.
And then I could not be more asleep for the afternoon during the daytime.
So, but whatever, I'll get my sleep schedule underway pretty, pretty soon.
And I think it can't hurt me to, um, to, uh, to completely rest, you know, to take even up to fuck it, maybe even a week off and let my body completely bounce back.

Cause you know, once it does, I'll be stronger when I start riding again and lighter, you know, I'm still a fat fuck, but, um, I'm not nearly as heavy as I was when I started riding a week or two ago.
So, I was going to weigh myself, but I need to get a new battery for my scale.
So, um, I'm, uh, yeah, I'm going to get, I'm thinking I'm going to get going and checking out Twitch now or I might lay down and try and have a nap.
But we'll see.
Alrighty, peace out.
